recent_calls.summary: The user, Stacy, called customer service to report that a technician did not show up and requested immediate assistance. The agent documented the issue but could not connect to a live agent after hours and informed Stacy that a representative would call back on the next business day.

The user called back after missing a call and requested to be connected to the caller. The agent explained that call transfers are not possible after hours but offered to notify the team to return the call on the next business day. The call ended shortly after without further input from the user.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and the user hanging up immediately after. No further conversation or information exchange took place.
The user, Mike from Missouri Crane, called and requested to speak with Gigi. The agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to the appropriate person. The call ended with a successful transfer.

Jason from American Home Shield called to request confirmation of the last technician visit date for a combo heat and AC unit related to a recall request after a heat exchanger replacement. The agent confirmed the details and assured that Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would follow up with the authorizations team once the email is provided. Jason declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive confirmation of the call summary.

Marvin called to schedule a service appointment for an air conditioning issue covered by American Home Shield warranty. The agent confirmed the service details and address, noted the request for the earliest appointment, and then transferred the call to a live representative as requested by the user.
The user returned a call after receiving a message indicating there were questions. The agent acknowledged the callback and transferred the user to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no further conversation.

The user, Joan, called to schedule a furnace replacement under their American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the dispatch number and appointment details, and the user declined additional maintenance program information. The user provided positive feedback about the agent's knowledge and the call concluded successfully.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call successfully to another representative.

The user called to confirm that a previously scheduled thermostat installation appointment was canceled and not needed anymore. The agent verified the user's details and confirmed the cancellation. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The agent attempted to engage the user by asking for their service address ZIP code, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after.
The user called and asked to speak to the boss. The AI agent confirmed it was an AI and then transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

The user called to schedule routine seasonal maintenance for their air conditioner and furnace. The agent provided available time slots, and the user selected Tuesday, April 7th at 8:00 a.m. The appointment was provisionally booked, but the user requested an immediate update to their email address, which was not completed during the call.
The user called and requested to speak with CJ. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate person.

Mikisha Richardson called to schedule a free AC tune-up and cleaning through American Home Shield. She requested a morning appointment on April 10th, and the agent confirmed her details and will pass the information to the team for follow-up. Mikisha provided positive feedback, rating the experience a 5 and appreciating the communication.

Donna Sanchez called to schedule her yearly air conditioner maintenance. The agent provided available time slots, and Donna selected Monday, April 6th at 4:00 p.m., which was provisionally booked. The call concluded with the agent informing Donna about the dispatch fee and requesting feedback, which Donna declined.

The user called to request an estimate for a new Goodman HVAC system installation after a recent visit from Budget. The agent collected the user's contact information, service address, and preferences, and confirmed the details before informing the user that someone from Budget would reach out shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Courtney Adelsberger called to request HVAC service records for a property her client is buying, specifically the last service date and details. The agent confirmed the details and informed her that Budget's team would follow up shortly. Courtney declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user called to schedule an appointment and requested to speak with a live person. The agent attempted to transfer the call to a live agent, and the transfer was successful.

Jeff from American Home Shield called to discuss a warranty issue regarding a compressor replaced by Budget five months ago. He requested a resubmission to ensure American Home Shield is not charged for a part that should be under warranty. The agent confirmed the details and clarified the warranty status before ending the call.

The user called to report an incomplete AC tune-up service where the box behind the unit was not put back and the unit was not rinsed. The agent confirmed the details and booked a follow-up appointment for the next day at 4:00 p.m. The user expressed satisfaction with the customer service and provided positive feedback.

The user, Ben, called back after missing a call from Nicole and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The agent acknowledged the callback and successfully transferred the call without any issues.
The user called back to follow up on an estimate and inquire about next steps. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Anthony Edmonds, called to request urgent heating and cooling service because his system is not blowing air. The agent gathered all necessary details and offered available appointment slots, but the user requested to speak with someone before scheduling. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to inquire about renewing their heating and cooling service and wanted to speak to a live person. The AI agent confirmed it was not a live person and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 19 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user, Stacy Fisher, called to inquire about the time of her appointment. The agent was unable to find the appointment in the system and offered to transfer her to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call was then successfully transferred to another agent.

The user called regarding an estimate for a heating flue replacement and scheduled the service for Saturday, April 27th at their property in Florissant, Missouri. The user confirmed they are the owner and that the issue is not an emergency. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.
The user returned a phone call and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

Deborah called to request an earlier heating service appointment than the originally scheduled April 13th. The agent successfully booked a provisional appointment for April 3rd at 2:00 p.m. and confirmed the details with Deborah. The call ended with the agent asking for feedback and Deborah agreeing to provide it.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer.

Stephen called to inquire about the ETA for technician Rich's arrival. The agent confirmed the appointment window but could not provide a more specific time. The call ended with the user being transferred to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called and was initially misidentified by the agent. The user requested to speak to a real human, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful.

The user called to inquire about a twenty dollar discount for completing a survey. The agent explained that the discount is applied to the service or invoice after verification and clarified that it is not sent via Cash App. The user declined further assistance and ended the call.

The user called to inquire about a survey related to recent work done by Budget. The agent explained how to access the survey and offered to have someone follow up with the user. The user confirmed they wanted follow-up assistance and provided their contact information.
The user called to ensure that the team contacts them before arriving at their house. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to inquire about the time of arrival for their existing cooling service appointment. The agent collected necessary details and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was successful.

The user called to ensure the gate code for building access was on record for an upcoming AC service. The user became frustrated upon realizing they were speaking with an AI and requested to speak with a live agent, leading to a successful call transfer.

The user called to report that the quote inspector for their AC and furnace was late and had not arrived as scheduled. The agent apologized for the inconvenience and transferred the call to someone who could provide live updates. The call ended with a successful transfer to another representative.

The user called and requested to speak with CJ, specifically wanting to set an appointment. The agent attempted to gather more details but the user insisted on speaking to a representative. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to inform the technician that they are home after missing a previous call. The agent acknowledged the message and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called back after a missed call to inquire about service for their heating and cooling unit, which is under extended warranty. They expressed the need to speak with someone before scheduling a technician visit due to financial concerns. The agent transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to inquire about the status of a packet being sent back to a partner with Assurant. The agent informed the user that they would pass the request to the appropriate team for follow-up. The user did not request any additional services and ended the call politely.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called and was initially misidentified by the agent. After correcting the name, the user requested to speak to a live person, and the agent transferred the call to another agent successfully.
